hero.question: Will the DHS shutdown end after March 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: The 10-point surge signals real money betting the shutdown resolves by March 31, likely driven by late-cycle budget fatigue and the political cost of extended service disruptions heading into 2026 midterms. At 51.6%, the market's essentially a coin flip, but historical shutdowns average 17 days and Congress has never let DHS stay dark past election season, making YES the smarter side of this bet.

daily_take.headline: DHS Shutdown Odds Spike 10 Points. The Market Just Priced In Reality.
daily_take.deck: DHS shutdown resolution jumped from 41.5% to 51.6% in 24 hours on fresh momentum. Congress still hasn't moved the needle on actual legislation, which means this bump is either ahead-of-the-game pricing or panic buying into a mirage. Smart money waits for concrete budget votes before chasing a number that just broke through the 50 line on air.
